prompt_latex: Entry $1$: Using simple interest, how many dollars of interest are earned on $300$ dollars at $6$ percent per year for $2$ years?
solution_latex: Simple interest is $Prt=300\cdot 6/100\cdot 2=36$.

prompt_latex: Entry $2$: An account has $400$ dollars and earns $25$ percent interest compounded annually. To the nearest dollar, what is the balance after $3$ years?
solution_latex: The balance is $400(1+25/100)^{3}=781$ to the nearest dollar.

prompt_latex: Entry $3$: Using simple interest, how many dollars of interest are earned on $500$ dollars at $10$ percent per year for $4$ years?
solution_latex: Simple interest is $Prt=500\cdot 10/100\cdot 4=200$.
